name: The Demo Daemon
effect: Execute a flawless product demonstration in a curated environment. This card is considered production-ready.

clauses.name: CONTROLLED CONDITIONS CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If the demo environment is isolated from production: The demo is considered representative.

clauses.name: DEVIATION OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If the audience requests an unscripted action: Redirect to a prepared slide.

clauses.name: FORGETFULNESS CLAUSE
clauses.rule: Next turn: No one remembers the demo did not match the product.

witness_quote: It worked perfectly in the demo.

translation_layer.skeptical_question: Can it do that with our data?
